creator: timp87@gmail.com
text:
Hi!
I've created patch for net-mgmt/zabbix2-server based on current net-mgmt/zabbix22-server.
It fixes problems with ODBC definition as DB engine and upgrades port to 2.0.12 version.
I hope it will be commited to ports branches too, after commmiting to current ports tree.
Thank you!
